payload.claim_text: In 2023, the total collision rate per million vehicles was 3.43, 13.6% better than the 3.97 rate in 2022. The improvements in the overall collision rate performance are in part attributed to roadway safety enforcement, traffic alerts, signage and pavement markings, and a change in safety enforcement tactics including pacing traffic with marked vehicles.

B&T's cashless tolling system reads E-ZPass tags and captures images of vehicles using equipment attached to gantries above the roadways. The overall toll roadway lane availability was 99.87% in 2023.
Operations and Maintenance Departments operate and maintain seven bridges and two tunnels serving customers who drive more than 327 million vehicles over its facilities annually.
